---
title: ""
about:
 template: jolla
 #image: assets/luke-23.jpg
 links:
   - icon: github
     text: Github
     href: https://github.com/lukmayer
   - icon: medium
     text: Medium
     href: https://medium.com/@willuk
   - icon: envelope
     text: Email
     href: mailto:willuk@vivaldi.net
format:
  html:
    smooth-scroll: true
    toc: false
---

::: {.text-center}

![](assets/luke-23.jpg){.circle width=45% height=45%}

:::

# Lukas W. Mayer

---

### Welcome to my website!
I'm Luke, and I'm currently a PhD Student in Cognitive Science at the University of California, Irvine.
In my research, I investigate the limits of human causal reasoning through Bayesian computational models.
I'm particularly interested in applying these models to enhance human-AI collaboration.
